title: The Shadows at Freddy's
description: This mod is a Minecraft adaptation of the popular game "Five Nights at Freddy's." It introduces new and classic animatronics, along with various blocks. Players can challenge themselves to survive five nights with the original FNAF 1 cast
body:
[![Kinetic Hosting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6bf4105c8ab34a8d5e21f2126205967f9200098_0.webp)](https://billing.kinetichosting.com/aff.php?aff=1207)

This mod is Developed by 
Flamingman: Coder/Modeller/Textures
jmynii: coder/Modeller
Sprocket: models
Sammmy: Textures
Silly: builder
Paddy: models
Galactic: models
Yoon: animatronic Models
Horror Bluey: Main Prop Modeller (From Update 4 Onword)
Kaoru: Pixel Artist



This mod is a reimagining of Five Nights at Freddy's for Minecraft, featuring both new and old animatronics, along with various blocks and frequent updates. Can you survive five nights with the original FNAF 1 robots or perhaps face reimagined versions of the withered animatronics? With the addition of new blocks and mobs, you can recreate Freddy Fazbear's Pizza or even design your own version.

In this mod, you have the ability to construct locations from the popular game Five Nights at Freddy's, and you can also create a game mode to survive five nights, similar to the original games.

Animatronics in the mod include:

FNAF 1: Foxy, Freddy, Bonnie, Chica, Golden Freddy, Endo_01

Adds Hundreds of Different Creative Blocks to Build your Own Pizza Place

This Also Includes Blocks from Fan Games
List of Fan games:
Five Nights At Candys 1/2
Pop goes/ Pop goes EverGreen
The Return to Bloody Nights

Added blocks; stage blocks (colours blue and red)

New Colour Types of Olive Plum Velvet Pastel Rose Blue Grey Shamrock green Cyan

Roof blocks Black Grey Yellow

SB wall with blue lights

Added spring grass spring wood

Props: FNAF 1 stars Sl shock pad Balloons Bathroom Signs (Mens and Womans) Light Buttons Light Props Shirt on hook prop 200 Tickets slab 300 ticket slab Crying kid Puppet crying kid Old PC Large Fan Large Rusted Fan Toy Robot CupCake Large prop Brown Desk White Desk

Functional Items Added Wrench Spray Can

Added stripped colours to outside wall blocks

Added new colours Lime Caput mortuum Fandango pink Peach Dark red Dark green

Added props Arcade (Updated) Christmas tree Default Christmas tree with candles Christmas tree with lights

Presents in Group Presents for: Silver and red Silver and green Silver and blue Gold and red Gold and blue Gold and green

FNAF 1 wall wires

Pizza boxs: sprockets pizza Karou pizza box

Blocks for Five Nights At Candy 2 Pop Goes/ Pop goes EverGreen The Return To Bloody Nights

Update Textures for All Kitchen Blocks All Doors Tocken Bin Carpet Party Floor

Remade Arcade Prop

There is Lots More to Explore in This Update

Please note that this mod is based on the Five Nights at Freddy's Franchise by Scott Cawthon, and all characters are owned by Scott Cawthon unless stated otherwise.

Reposting this mod on any other site is not allowed unless explicitly permitted and linked to by the original creators.
